arts.sum: PSG came back from two goals down to defeat Manchester City who are in jeopardy of being eliminated from the UEFA Champions League.

arts.ttl: Neves header puts PSG 3-2 up against Man City
arts.sum: Unmarked Joao Neves puts PSG 3-2 up against Manchester City in the Champions League, with a "beautiful" header at the back post.

arts.ttl: Man City in danger of Champions League exit after defeat at PSG
arts.sum: Manchester City's chances of Champions League progress are in peril after they lose a two-goal lead to slump to defeat against Paris St-Germain at Parc des Princes.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admission says it all with Man City on the brink of shock Champions League exit
arts.sum: Manchester City are at risk of dropping out of the new-look Champions League at the first hurdle after blowing a two-goal lead against Paris Saint-Germain on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: How PSG and Man City could be eliminated from Champions League
arts.sum: The new Champions League format divided opinion but it’s grown in excitement and it’s poised to be a thrilling final matchday with two of the richest clubs in the world at serious...

arts.ttl: PSG terminate Juan Bernat’s contract to allow Randal Kolo Muani to complete Juventus switch
arts.sum: As per L’Équipe, Juan Bernat (31) has seen his Paris Saint-Germain contract terminated in a move that allows Randal Kolo Muani (26) to complete a loan move to Juventus. Kolo Muani, who…

arts.ttl: PSG finally shows it can shine in Champions League without Mbappé
arts.sum: PSG coach Luis Enrique said before facing City that the solution up front would come from more teamwork rather than hoping another player can emulate Mbappé, who scored 44 goals last season and helped PSG reach the Champions League semifinals. PSG winger Bradley Barcola scored one goal and set up another for France teammate Ousmane Dembélé, and midfielder Joao Neves headed in the third before striker Gonçalo Ramos rammed in the fourth in stoppage time.

arts.ttl: Man City accused of encouraging player to break contract
arts.sum: Real Valladolid accuse Manchester City of encouraging one of their players to break his contract to force through a move to the Premier League club.

arts.ttl: PSG 4-2 Man City: Match report & 3 talking points from Champions League epic
arts.sum: Full analysis and talking points as Manchester City fall to a 4-2 defeat to PSG in the Champions League.
